ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storm_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm event */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the storm event in UTC */,
  "peak_hs_m" REAL /* Peak wave height of the storm event in meters */,
  "duration_hrs" INTEGER /* Duration of the storm event in hours */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to additional information or resources about the storm event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the type of storm */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location of the storm */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the severity of the storm */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Unique name for the storm event for easy identification */,
  "start_utc" TEXT /* Start time of the storm event in UTC */,
  "end_utc" TEXT /* End time of the storm event in UTC */,
  "wind_speed_kmph" REAL /* Peak wind speed during the storm event in kilometers per hour */,
  "pressure_mbar" REAL /* Minimum central pressure during the storm event in millibars */,
  "storm_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the storm movement */,
  "storm_speed_kmph" REAL /* Speed of the storm movement in kilometers per hour */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the storm */,
  "damage_reported" TEXT /* Summary of the damage reported */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities reported */,
  "economic_loss_usd" REAL /* Estimated economic loss in US dollars */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the storm event record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storm event record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the storm event record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storm event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_events_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES storm_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES storm_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES storm_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storm type */,
  "severity_scale" TEXT /* Scale used to measure the severity of the storm type (e.g., Saffir-Simpson Hurricane Wind Scale) */,
  "common_impact" TEXT /* Common impacts associated with this storm type */,
  "historical_frequency" TEXT /* Historical frequency of this storm type in different regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "ocean_basin" TEXT /* Ocean basin where the location is situated */,
  "depth_m" REAL /* Average depth of the ocean at this location in meters */,
  "current_speed_kmph" REAL /* Average current speed at this location in kilometers per hour */,
  "current_direction" TEXT /* Average current direction at this location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale used to measure the severity level (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "wind_speed_range_kmph" TEXT /* Range of wind speeds associated with this severity level */,
  "pressure_range_mbar" TEXT /* Range of central pressures associated with this severity level */,
  "common_impact" TEXT /* Common impacts associated with this severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)
